allow: Bash(npm install @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three framer-motion zustand lucide-react tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite)

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./backend/data/products.json''\); const cc4 = p.find\(x => x.product_id===''CC-004''\); const cc6 = p.find\(x => x.product_id===''CC-006''\); console.log\(''CC-004:'', cc4.description, ''|'', cc4.benefits.join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''---''\); console.log\(''CC-006:'', cc6.description, ''|'', cc6.benefits.join\('', ''\)\)")
